---
title: "Day 5 · Exercise (graded)"
subtitle: "Multi-variable visualisation"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format: html
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
```

# 1. Scatter with a grouping variable

Produce a scatterplot of two continuous tourism variables, coloured by
a categorical variable, with a linear smoother per group.

```{r}
# your code here
```

# 2. Faceted distribution

Pick a continuous variable and a grouping variable with 4–8 levels.
Produce small-multiples (faceted boxplots or violins) comparing the
distribution across groups.

```{r}
# your code here
```

# 3. Correlation panel

Build a correlation heatmap for at least five numeric variables of your
chosen dataset. Comment on the two strongest correlations.

```{r}
# your code here
```

# 4. Interpretation

In 8–10 sentences, describe what combining the three views tells you
about the data. What would you test next in a regression model?
